steps: Place mice in clean cages and keep warm with a heat lamp for ~5 min with constant monitoring to induce vasodilation.
Transfer mice to a restrainer with a hole for the tail.
Apply 70% Ethanol wipes to tail and turn 45º for a visible presentation of tail vein.
Introduce a 27G syringe into tail vein to administer an injectate into mice. (For precise volume introduction, a U-100 insulin syringe can be used to avoid dead volumes.)
Apply light pressure over the injection site for ~30 sec to prevent backflow.
Return mice to housing cages and monitor for the next several days for any evidence of swelling or complications at the injection site.
creator: Lili Liang
